---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability for AppThere Loki
title: "[FEATURE]: "
labels: enhancement, untriaged
assignees: ''
---

## 🧩 User Story
**As a** [type of user, e.g., Academic Writer, Project Manager]
**I want** [a specific action/capability]
**So that** [the specific benefit or value added].

## 📋 Description
A clear and concise description of what the feature is. Please explain the "Why" behind this request.

## 🛠️ Technical Context (For AI & Contributors)
*Providing these details helps tools like Claude Code draft an implementation.*
- **Target Module:** (e.g., `loki-writer`, `loki-core`, `antigravity-ui`)
- **Interoperability Requirement:** Does this feature need to map to a specific LibreOffice/OpenOffice function? (Yes/No)
- **Proposed Logic:** If you have an idea of how this should be implemented in Rust/C#, describe it here.

## 🎨 UI/UX Considerations
- Does this require a new component in the **Antigravity** toolkit?
- Where should this live in the interface? (e.g., "Insert Menu", "Right-hand Properties Sidebar")

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Requirement 1 (e.g., "Feature persists after saving to .odt")
- [ ] Requirement 2 (e.g., "Keyboard shortcut Ctrl+Shift+X is mapped")
- [ ] Requirement 3

## 🔗 Additional Context / Reference
Add any screenshots, mockups, or links to how this feature works in other office suites for reference.
